features.title: Multi-Source Data Collection and Unified Formatting
features.description: Collect and format IFT and sentiment-classification datasets.

Sentiment-classification datasets are converted into one unified format

features.title: Price-Based Weak Supervision for Twitter Data
features.description: Generate Bullish/Bearish/Neutral labels for unlabeled social data from price windows.
features.evidence: No verified weak-labeling output is present in this repository yet.

features.title: Stage 2 LoRA-Sentiment Crypto Fine-Tuning and Evaluation

features.title: LLM Inference Pipeline and API Wrapper
features.description: Provide sentiment and generation Python functions for Chatbot.
features.evidence: 2026-04-27: Implemented deterministic mock/fallback wrappers for `predict_sentiment`, `batch_predict_sentiment`, and `generate_response` under `lora/src/inference`. 2026-04-28 update: replaced the temporary custom endpoint plan with the verified AutoDL OpenAI-compatible vLLM `/chat/completions` integration. `predict_sentiment` uses `sentiment-lora`, normalizes lower-case labels, and fills missing scores; `generate_response` uses `ift-lora` and strips `<|eot_id|>`. Verified with `cd lora && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (7 passed), direct AutoDL real-mode calls through the local SSH tunnel returning Bullish sentiment and non-empty ift-lora text, and Chatbot isolated `USE_MOCK=false RAG_USE_MOCK=true` API verification. 2026-05-08: Added `classify_intent()` wrapper using `ift-lora` for structured Chatbot intent routing, with mock heuristics and JSON/key-value fallback parsing. Verified with `cd lora && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (10 passed). Real AutoDL tunnel verification returned the expected intent routes for BTC sentiment, Ethereum technology, and Hello through Chatbot. Later 2026-05-08: Added `extract_entities()` wrapper using `ift-lora` for structured NER JSON, with mock fixtures and parser support for strict JSON, fenced JSON, and mixed text. Verified with `cd lora && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q` (13 passed) and Chatbot real matrix using `NER_BACKEND=lora`.
verification: mock/fallback functions return shared dataclass shapes
real mode without remote configuration raises RuntimeError
AutoDL remote LoRA endpoint integration succeeds
classify_intent returns structured intent routing JSON
